title: Native Pi TUI targeted repair proof
goal: Prove that a native Pi TUI worker result can fail slice verification, trigger bounded targeted repair, rerun verification, and merge only after post-repair verification passes.
acceptance: Document a native Pi TUI proof where the first accepted worker result artifact fails a slice verify command and KD records the check failure.
Evidence includes targeted slice repair attempt launch, repair output from a KD-owned artifact path, verify rerun, post-repair pass, and merge only after post-repair verification passes.
The proof document distinguishes slice repair from integration repair and states what repair behavior proves and does not prove.
must_ask_if: The repair proof would require authorizing paths outside the proof slice areas or weakening path guards.
The worker tries to change workflow policy, profiles, verification commands, or unrelated slices as part of repair.
